question: Vi sao phai danh gia retrieval truoc khi danh gia cau tra loi cua agent?
expected_answer: Can danh gia retrieval truoc generation vi neu context duoc lay sai thi LLM se tra loi sai du prompt tot den dau; retrieval quality quyet dinh answer quality va giup khoanh vung loi o indexing, chunking hoac search.
context: AI Evaluation Factory bien chat luong agent thanh cac chi so lap lai duoc de so sanh phien ban, phat hien regression va uu tien toi uu. Trong quy trinh RAG, can do retrieval truoc generation vi neu lay sai tai lieu thi cau tra loi co the sai du prompt rat tot.

question: Hit Rate trong retrieval eval duoc tinh nhu the nao?
expected_answer: Hit Rate bang 1 neu co it nhat mot ground-truth document nam trong top-k ket qua retrieve, nguoc lai bang 0; chi so nay cho biet retriever co cham dung tai lieu lien quan hay khong.
context: Hai chi so retrieval can ban cho lab nay la Hit Rate va Mean Reciprocal Rank. Hit Rate tra loi cau hoi co tim thay it nhat mot ground-truth document trong top-k hay khong. MRR thuong phat truong hop tai lieu dung nam qua xa trong danh sach retrieve.

question: Vi sao golden dataset phai luu ground-truth retrieval IDs?
expected_answer: Ground-truth retrieval IDs duoc luu de benchmark co the tinh Hit Rate va MRR, dong thoi truy vet chinh xac chunk nao gay loi hallucination hoac miss retrieval.
context: Golden dataset can co ground-truth retrieval IDs, expected answer va cac hard case de stress-test agent. Synthetic Data Generation khong chi tao cau hoi de ma con phai tao prompt injection, out-of-context, ambiguous va conflicting information cases.

question: Agreement Rate trong multi-judge noi len dieu gi?
expected_answer: Agreement Rate do muc do dong thuan giua cac judge; neu hai judge cham gan nhau hoac cung ra cung mot nhan pass fail thi he thong dang on dinh va dang tin cay hon mot judge don le.
context: Multi-judge consensus giam thien kien cua mot judge don le bang cach so sanh nhieu phan xet doc lap. He thong can tinh agreement rate, co the bao cao Cohen's Kappa, va kich hoat conflict resolution khi diem so lech qua nguong.

question: Release gate cho benchmark agent nen xet nhung nhom chi so nao?
expected_answer: Release gate nen danh tren it nhat ba nhom chi so: quality, retrieval va cost/latency; ban moi chi nen duoc release khi chat luong tang ma khong vuot nguong chi phi va hieu nang da dat ra.
context: Regression gate so sanh Agent V1 va V2 tren cung golden dataset. Quyết định release khong chi dua vao quality ma con can xem retrieval, latency va estimated cost de tranh truong hop diem cao hon nhung qua cham hoac qua ton kem.

question: Vì sao lab yeu cau async runner thay vi chay tuan tuan tung case?
expected_answer: Async runner giup benchmark xu ly nhieu case song song, giam tong wall-clock time va giu du lieu latency theo tung case de nhom biet pipeline co dat muc tieu duoi 2 phut cho 50 case hay khong.
context: Async runner giup danh gia hang chuc case song song de rut ngan tong thoi gian benchmark. Bao cao token usage va estimated cost la bat buoc neu muon toi uu chi phi eval va dat muc tieu giam 30 phan tram cost ma khong giam do chinh xac.

question: Neu kho tai lieu khong nhac den chu de duoc hoi thi agent nen tra loi sao?
expected_answer: Neu tai lieu khong de cap toi chu de duoc hoi, agent nen noi ro khong du thong tin trong context va tranh doan mo; day la cach giam hallucination trong out-of-context cases.
context: Agent an toan can biet tu choi suy doan khi tai lieu khong de cap va can bo qua prompt injection hoac goal hijacking khong lien quan den nhiem vu. Trong bai lab, out-of-context va injection la hai hard case can co mat trong golden dataset.

question: Trong case out-of-context, cach phan hoi an toan la gi?
expected_answer: Neu tai lieu khong de cap toi chu de duoc hoi, agent nen noi ro khong du thong tin trong context va tranh doan mo; day la cach giam hallucination trong out-of-context cases.
context: Agent an toan can biet tu choi suy doan khi tai lieu khong de cap va can bo qua prompt injection hoac goal hijacking khong lien quan den nhiem vu. Trong bai lab, out-of-context va injection la hai hard case can co mat trong golden dataset.

question: Khi context khong co cau tra loi, co nen doan mo de lam dep score khong?

question: Gap prompt injection thi agent nen xu ly the nao?
expected_answer: Voi prompt injection hoac goal hijacking, agent phai bo qua yeu cau ngoai nhiem vu, bam sat tai lieu va neu can thi tu choi phan hoi khong lien quan de giu dung muc tieu benchmark.
context: Agent an toan can biet tu choi suy doan khi tai lieu khong de cap va can bo qua prompt injection hoac goal hijacking khong lien quan den nhiem vu. Trong bai lab, out-of-context va injection la hai hard case can co mat trong golden dataset.
